changelog: v371: Crash prevention - StackOverflowError guard (depth cap + Throwable catch) in VideoInfoOverlay view recursion
v371: AutoResume - unguarded SharedPreferences reads at entry point now try-guarded (prevents ClassCastException crash)
v371: AutoResume - resume-retry runnable now cancellable + Activity destroy-guarded (prevents leak/BadTokenException)
v371: Minibar - runaway 300ms poll loop now single-instance/cancellable/slower cadence (fixes primary ANR suspect)
v371: Minibar - clearTracking() now cancels all Handler callbacks (prevents Activity leak + post-destroy crashes)
